properties.name: studio.ai.rag.chunk-size
properties.description: Legacy fallback chunk size used when starter-chunking is absent.

properties.name: studio.ai.rag.chunk-overlap

properties.name: studio.ai.rag.retrieval.vector-weight

properties.description: Lexical score weight for hybrid retrieval.

properties.description: Enable keyword-enriched fallback retrieval.

properties.name: studio.ai.rag.keywords.scope
properties.description: Keyword metadata scope.

properties.description: Enable text cleaning before indexing.

properties.name: studio.ai.rag.diagnostics.enabled
properties.description: Enable RAG diagnostics collection.

properties.name: studio.ai.rag.jobs.repository
properties.description: RAG job repository type.
